meaning: adj.极地附近的,[天文]围绕天极的,拱极的n.拱极星
examples: The Antarctic Circumpolar Wave (ACW) is a newly discovered ocean phenomenon.
That's because of a clockwise current of water called the Antarctic circumpolar current.
Sea ice vocabularies of similar magnitude and sophistication are reported from Inuit communities across the circumpolar North.
They have amplified their power by banding together in the Inuit Circumpolar Council, (ICC), a body created in 1977.
